7:
SELECT Segment FROM (
   SELECT c.Segment,
          ((SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013') THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
           SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012') THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
          /
          NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012') THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END),0)*100.0 AS pct_inc
   FROM customers c
   JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
   WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
   GROUP BY c.Segment
) 
ORDER BY pct_inc DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment FROM (
   SELECT c.Segment,
          ((SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013') THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
           SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012') THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
          /
          NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012') THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END),0)*100.0 AS pct_inc
   FROM customers c
   JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
   WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
   GROUP BY c.Segment
) 
ORDER BY pct_inc ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
